pov_character: Marcus Publius Scipio (Roman centurion), Jesus ben Yosef, Mary of Magdala
key_themes: Pattern Eye and blood memory activation
Roman occupation and coming Jewish revolt
Defensive network protecting itself during persecution

seven_keys_status.Pattern Eye: Used by Jesus to access complete Genesis Protocol and blood memories

Ministry and teaching of defensive network principles (28-30 CE)

network_evolution.key_insight: Jesus realizes centralized authority collapses when the leader dies - teaches decentralized system instead
network_evolution.blood_memory: Mary of Magdala accesses Nefertari's memories from 1177 BCE Bronze Age collapse
network_evolution.defensive_strategy: Spread knowledge through multiple independent cells rather than single hierarchy
